articles.author: Cleve R. Wootson Jr., Ellen Francis
articles.title: At G-7, allies plan for a world less reliant on the U.S. - The Washington Post
articles.description: After a decade of trying to manage Donald Trump, Europe’s leaders will shift their approach this week to balance cooperation with a growing resistance to U.S. pressure.
articles.content: ÉVIAN-LES-BAINS, France When President Donald Trump arrives on the shores of Lake Geneva for this weeks Group of Seven summit, he will find Americas closest allies in a new posture: increasingly will… [+18 chars]

articles.title: On June 9, 2026, NASA named Italian astronaut Luca Parmitano as pilot of Artemis 3, making him the first European ever assigned to an Artemis crew — and within hours ESA's director general framed the seat not as a courtesy but as the opening move in a ne - Space Daily
articles.description: On 9 June 2026, inside a room at NASA’s Johnson Space Center in Houston, the agency named the four people who will fly Artemis 3 — and one of them was not American. Italian astronaut Luca Parmitano was introduced as the mission’s pilot, the first European Spa…
